name: Tomato Basil Drop Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Saute onion in oil until tender, about 7 minutes.
3. Add garlic (if desired) and tomato. Cook for one minute more.
4. Remove from heat and stir in basil and oregano. Allow to cool slightly.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper.
6. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles crumbs.
7. Stir in milk and tomato mixture until combined; it will be sticky.
8. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
This rewritten recipe maintains the original title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency in formatting and language.
